detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ForgeTv._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ForgeTv.sol#659-783):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (ForgeTv.sol#723)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ForgeTv.sol#797-809)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (ForgeTv.sol#729)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5)) (ForgeTv.sol#817)
		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5)) (ForgeTv.sol#819)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ForgeTv.sol#781)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (ForgeTv.sol#945)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (ForgeTv.sol#925)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ForgeTv.sol#927)
	ForgeTv._rOwned (ForgeTv.sol#337) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ForgeTv._takeTeam(uint256) (ForgeTv.sol#939-947)
	- ForgeTv._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (ForgeTv.sol#899-935)
	- ForgeTv.balanceOf(address) (ForgeTv.sol#485-489)
	- ForgeTv.constructor() (ForgeTv.sol#419-449)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ForgeTv.sol#781)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ForgeTv.sol#953)
	ForgeTv._rTotal (ForgeTv.sol#349) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ForgeTv._getCurrentSupply() (ForgeTv.sol#1095-1105)
	- ForgeTv._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (ForgeTv.sol#951-957)
	- ForgeTv.constructor() (ForgeTv.sol#419-449)
	- ForgeTv.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (ForgeTv.sol#581-603)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [ForgeTv._transfer(address,address,uint256)](ForgeTv.sol#L659-L783):

		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](ForgeTv.sol#L797-L809)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](ForgeTv.sol#L729)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount.mul(3).div(5))](ForgeTv.sol#L817)
		- [_developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5))](ForgeTv.sol#L819)
	State variables written after the call(s):

		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](ForgeTv.sol#L945)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](ForgeTv.sol#L925)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](ForgeTv.sol#L927)
	[ForgeTv._rOwned](ForgeTv.sol#L337) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ForgeTv._takeTeam(uint256)](ForgeTv.sol#L939-L947)
	- [ForgeTv._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](ForgeTv.sol#L899-L935)
	- [ForgeTv.balanceOf(address)](ForgeTv.sol#L485-L489)
	- [ForgeTv.constructor()](ForgeTv.sol#L419-L449)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](ForgeTv.sol#L781)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](ForgeTv.sol#L953)
	[ForgeTv._rTotal](ForgeTv.sol#L349) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [ForgeTv._getCurrentSupply()](ForgeTv.sol#L1095-L1105)
	- [ForgeTv._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](ForgeTv.sol#L951-L957)
	- [ForgeTv.constructor()](ForgeTv.sol#L419-L449)
	- [ForgeTv.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](ForgeTv.sol#L581-L603)

		- _developmentAddress.transfer(amount.mul(2).div(5)) (ForgeTv.sol#819)

		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ForgeTv.sol#927)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ForgeTv.sol#781)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ForgeTv.sol#953)
	- _redisFee = _redisFeeOnBuy (ForgeTv.sol#757)
	- _redisFee = _redisFeeOnSell (ForgeTv.sol#769)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ForgeTv.sol#781)
		- _redisFee = _previousredisFee (ForgeTv.sol#629)
		- _redisFee = 0 (ForgeTv.sol#619)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ForgeTv.sol#781)
		- _tFeeTotal = _tFeeTotal.add(tFee) (ForgeTv.sol#955)
	- _taxFee = _taxFeeOnBuy (ForgeTv.sol#759)
	- _taxFee = _taxFeeOnSell (ForgeTv.sol#771)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ForgeTv.sol#781)
		- _taxFee = _previoustaxFee (ForgeTv.sol#631)
		- _taxFee = 0 (ForgeTv.sol#621)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(sender,recipient,tTransferAmount) (ForgeTv.sol#933)
		- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ForgeTv.sol#781)
